performance_overview: Through 42 sessions (inception 2026-06-01) Bull holds 5 open positions (SCHW, PCG, XLU, CMG, GIS). Account equity $100,717.75 (+0.72% from $100K inception). Today: TSLA exited on confirmed death cross (-$199.70, -4.78%); GIS entered at $35.89 (207 shares, 75% unit due to shallow cross). Net day P&L -$3.01 as TSLA loss was nearly fully offset by broad gains across remaining positions. Total unrealized P&L across 5 open positions is approximately +$1,019. Strategy is working — trend entries from Jul 6-14 are all profitable with strong stop cushions.
best_signals: RSI 55-60 at entry: 2/2 wins (100%), avg +2.15% — the ONLY consistently profitable bucket for the legacy intraday RSI strategy; enforce hard floor+ceiling (RSI between 55 and 60 inclusive); n=2 (directionally clean but thin sample — maintain until n≥10)
avoid: RSI 60-65 at entry: 0/3 wins (0%), avg -1.06% — every overbought chase entry has lost; hard ceiling at 60, no exceptions ever
RSI 65-75 at entry: 0/1 wins (0%), avg -0.61% — confirmed gap-up trap territory; skip on sight

Gap-up opens with RSI >60 on opening bar: zero qualifications across all prior sessions; any name whose live RSI exceeds 60 on the first 1-min bar is a hard skip regardless of setup quality, conviction, or premarket RSI

Opening-bar RSI surge pattern: premarket-clean RSI names have routinely surged past 60 on the opening bar — the gap-up trap is systematic; do NOT enter within first 5-10 minutes of open even if premarket RSI was clean

Current defensives/utilities/managed-care universe (DTE, WEC, CNC, D, FRT, ED, EIX, NSC, KIM, AMGN, MTB, FITB, CL, SJM, CNC, ES): chronic ATR% compression 0.042-0.189% far below 0.30% floor; this entire universe is effectively dead for the intraday RSI strategy and MUST be replaced

Shallow EMA cross entries on earnings-adjacent names: TSLA (Jul 7 entry, 0.06% cross spread, earnings Jul 22) lost -4.78% on exit. Rule: skip (do not size down) when BOTH shallow cross spread (<0.5%) AND earnings within 14 days apply simultaneously
